title: leucas ellipticifolia
intro: Leucas ellipticifolia, also known as sweet leucas, is a plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucas ellipticifolia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve cognitive function. Leucas ellipticifolia is prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
